summary: Implemented requested daily-input UX enhancements on SIMMUTU create page: retitled heading to Input Realisasi Mutu Harian, added month selector, added daily trend chart (1..last day of month) with visible gaps for missing entries, and missing-day summary text. Backend create action now accepts month param, returns calendar day skeleton and daily rows filtered to daily frequency and user department when present. Existing realtime percentage preview, indicator explanations, auto inputter/departemen behavior remain intact.
current_status: The page now supports daily trend visibility and gap detection for easier planning/input follow-up. Build, lint, Pint, and SIMMUTU feature tests pass. Remaining optional enhancement: clickable day points to prefill the selected date automatically.
